summary: Comprehensive testing of Stripe subscription integration for TheCryptoCoach.io. Backend APIs 100% passing (16 tests). Frontend E2E tests 100% passing (16 tests). Found 1 UI bug: unauthenticated users incorrectly see Free tier marked as 'current'.

issues.description: Unauthenticated users see Free tier marked as 'Plan actuel' (current plan) with 'Actuel' badge. This is confusing because they have no account yet.
issues.reproduction:
1. Open /pricing page without logging in
2. Observe Free tier card shows 'Actuel' badge and button shows 'Plan actuel' instead of 'Commencer gratuitement'
issues.affected_test: subscription.spec.ts: BUG: unauthenticated users see Free as current tier incorrectly - test PASSES documenting buggy behavior
issues.fix_suggestion: Change line 168 from `const currentTier = user?.subscription_tier || 'free';` to `const currentTier = user ? user.subscription_tier : null;` and update the rendering logic to only show 'Actuel' badge when user is logged in

action_items: FIX: PricingPage.jsx - Only show 'Actuel' badge and 'Plan actuel' button when user is actually logged in (line 168)

features_tested.subscription_tiers_api: PASS - Returns all 4 tiers (free, starter, pro, elite) with correct prices
features_tested.user_subscription_status_api: PASS - Returns current user subscription with auth required
features_tested.stripe_checkout_creation: PASS - Creates checkout sessions for all paid tiers, returns Stripe URLs
features_tested.checkout_status_api: PASS - Handles invalid session IDs gracefully
features_tested.authentication_flow: PASS - Login, invalid credentials, duplicate registration all work correctly
features_tested.pricing_page_ui: PASS - Shows 4 tier cards with correct prices, features, and buttons
features_tested.navigation_pricing_link: PASS - Pricing link visible in navigation
features_tested.stripe_redirect: PASS - Clicking paid tier button redirects to Stripe checkout

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user: test_subscription@example.com / Test123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe subscription integration is fully functional. The only issue is a minor UI bug where unauthenticated users see the Free tier marked as current. All backend APIs and Stripe integration work correctly.
